sys_script_fix.description:
2.8.4 HF - STRY0147858 - The "Synchronize OU TA & GTA per Org Unit" fix script will be relabeled to "Sync OUHA, TM, TA per OU" When a Tasker App Admin runs the "Sync OUHA, TM, TA per OU" fix script, the Org Hierarchy form will do the following: (current functionality) move the Task Administrator list to the Top OU for performance (current functionality) sets the OU Administrator for each OU where a member has the OUHA role (new functionality) Remove any user that does not exist anymore in the OUHA, TM, and TA list on the Org Hierarchy form for all OUs
Release Introduced: 2.8 - Can be run if user roles for Task Administrator, Task Manager, or OU Hierarchy Administrators are out of sync
Purpose for Task Managers: - This script sets the Task Managers for each ou to the full list of members with this role - This script should be run when member roles are out of sync Purpose for OU Administrators - This script sets the OU Administrators for each out to the full list of members with this role - This script should be run when member roles are out of sync Purpose for Task Administrators - This script sets the Task Administrators for the Top Ou of each Org Structure to the full list of members with this role - This script should be run when member roles are out of sync - Set the
Validation: - Open the Organizational Hierarchy Table - /x_153465_discovert_discover_office_hierarchy_list.do - Add the OU Administrator field "OU Hierarchy Administrators" to the list - Add the Task Managers field "Task Managers" to the list - Add the Task Administrators field "Task Administrators" to the list - Load the Organizational Members table in a separate window - RESULT: The "OU Hierarchy Administrators" field should contain the list of members with the OU Hierarchy role in the Organizational Members table - RESULT: The "Task Managers" field should contain the list of members with the Task Manager role in the Organizational Members table - RESULT: The Task Administrator fields on Top OUs should be populated with all members of the organizational structure with the role Task Administrator in the Organizational Members table
If any values are wrong, report the differences to the DTech Apps support team.
sys_script_fix.name: Sync OUHA, TM, TA per OU
sys_script_fix.sys_name: Sync OUHA, TM, TA per OU
